example_tasks: Align team goals with company objectives
Balance the workload between two teams
Partition the hard drive for dual boot
Frame the argument for the proposal
Compare pricing plans for SaaS tools
Align the design elements on the page
poor_matches: Call the dentist for an appointment
Send an email to the client
reasoning: The icon represents structure, comparison, or partitioning. It is useful for tasks involving organizing, aligning, or comparing multiple items, but it is too abstract for general task management.
